title: I Love You, I'm Sorry
why_this_song: I Love You, I'm Sorry by Gracie Abrams (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: We'll have been talking, but not all that often, we're cool now
I'll be on a boat, you're on a plane
Lay on the horn to prove that it haunts me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "life" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "life" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "goes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I stare at the crash, it actually works

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're in your Benz, I'm by the gate
Thankful you don't send someone to kill me

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "I Love You, I'm Sorry" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "I Love You, I'm Sorry", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Love You, I'm Sorry" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Love You, I'm Sorry" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Love You, I'm Sorry" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Love You, I'm Sorry" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
